title: Villazón Cold Snap
lead: Villazón is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.40. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current cold snap in Villazón has led to a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD) with a value of 12.9 GG. 
 The low temperature and humidity of 34% are contributing factors to this severe weather condition. 
 The wind speed of 11.8 km/h is also exacerbating the cold snap, making it feel even colder.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
